# Task RQ-0932: Add Integration Tests for Queue Search Command

## Status: COMPLETE

**All planned integration tests have been implemented and verified passing.**

## Task Goal

Create comprehensive E2E integration tests for the `ralph queue search` CLI command.

## Implementation Summary

The following test file has been created and verified:

- `crates/ralph/tests/queue_search_test.rs` - 474 lines, 12 tests

### Tests Implemented (All Passing)

| Test | Description | Status |
|------|-------------|--------|
| `queue_search_substring_mode_finds_matches` | Basic substring search | PASS |
| `queue_search_regex_mode_patterns_work` | Regex pattern matching with `--regex` | PASS |
| `queue_search_fuzzy_mode_tolerance_works` | Fuzzy matching with typo tolerance via `--fuzzy` | PASS |
| `queue_search_case_sensitive_mode` | Case-sensitive search with `--match-case` | PASS |
| `queue_search_with_tag_filter` | Filter by `--tag` flag | PASS |
| `queue_search_with_scope_filter` | Filter by `--scope` flag | PASS |
| `queue_search_with_status_filter` | Filter by `--status` flag | PASS |
| `queue_search_include_done_and_only_done` | Archive search with `--include-done` and `--only-done` | PASS |
| `queue_search_scheduled_filter` | Filter scheduled tasks with `--scheduled` | PASS |
| `queue_search_output_formats` | Output formats (compact, long, json) | PASS |
| `queue_search_limit_and_all` | Result limiting with `--limit` and `--all` | PASS |
| `queue_search_conflicting_flags_errors` | Error handling for conflicting flags | PASS |

## Verification

```bash
# Run the integration tests
cargo test -p ralph --test queue_search_test

# Expected output:
# running 12 tests
# test result: ok. 12 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 0 measured; 0 filtered out
```

## Phase 2 Instructions

**No implementation work required.** The task is complete.

1. Verify tests still pass: `cargo test -p ralph --test queue_search_test`
2. Run full CI gate: `make ci` (or `make macos-ci` on macOS)
3. Mark task as complete

## Files Created

- `crates/ralph/tests/queue_search_test.rs` - 474 lines of integration tests

## Files Referenced (Read-Only)

- `crates/ralph/src/cli/queue/search.rs` - CLI handler
- `crates/ralph/src/queue/search/mod.rs` - Unified search entry point
- `crates/ralph/src/queue/search/fields.rs` - Searchable field iteration
- `crates/ralph/src/queue/search/fuzzy.rs` - Fuzzy matching
- `crates/ralph/src/queue/search/substring.rs` - Substring/regex matching
- `crates/ralph/src/queue/search/filter.rs` - Status/tag/scope filtering
- `crates/ralph/tests/test_support.rs` - Test helpers

## Notes

- All tests use isolated temp directories via `test_support::temp_dir_outside_repo()`
- Tests are fully parallelizable (no `serial_test` needed)
- JSON format used for assertions requiring specific task IDs
- Error paths tested for conflicting flag combinations
- Related task RQ-0914 covers additional error path tests
